summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that DRI is currently testing its Daily 200MA support zone near $192.9. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 71.4%. The asset has recently tested this support 1 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $207.59 and a significant trendline confluence around $198.49 (formed by 5 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
